entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: Cereal crop genotypes used to study fermentation kinetics of stems

entities.name: MILLET
entities.description: Cereal crop genotypes used to study fermentation kinetics of stems

entities.name: IN VITRO FERMENTATION
entities.description: Laboratory method used to simulate rumen fermentation and measure gas production

entities.name: GAS PRODUCTION PROFILES
entities.description: The pattern of gas release over time during fermentation

entities.name: MULTIPHASE MODEL
entities.description: Mathematical model used to fit gas production data and determine kinetics parameters

entities.name: MONOPHASIC MODEL
entities.description: Mathematical model used to provide initial parameter estimates for the multiphase model

entities.name: FERMENTATION KINETICS PARAMETERS
entities.description: Quantitative values derived from the multiphase model describing the rate and extent of fermentation

entities.name: A
entities.description: A specific parameter of the multiphase model

entities.name: B
entities.description: A specific parameter of the multiphase model

entities.name: C
entities.description: A specific parameter of the multiphase model

entities.name: A1
entities.description: Asymptotic gas production of the first phase of fermentation

entities.name: NDF
entities.description: Neutral Detergent Fiber, a measure of the total cell wall content of the plant

entities.name: LIGNIN
entities.description: A complex polymer in plant cell walls that reduces digestibility

entities.name: RM2
entities.description: Maximum fractional rate of substrate digestion in the second phase of fermentation

entities.name: TMAX1
entities.description: Time at which the fermentation rate reaches its maximum in the first phase

entities.name: ADF
entities.description: Acid Detergent Fiber, a measure of cellulose and lignin content

entities.name: TMAX2
entities.description: Time at which the fermentation rate reaches its maximum in the second phase

entities.name: FEED QUALITY
entities.description: The degree of digestibility and nutritional value of crop residues

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, where the crops were grown

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the research crops were grown at ICRISAT

entities.name: RUMEN
entities.description: The first stomach of ruminant animals, relevant for in vivo outflow rates
